results.name: skyshroud forest
results.description: A forest that was once on Rath, and is now part of Dominaria.

results.name: sleeping enchantment
results.description: Enchantments that permanently "wake up" and become creatures.

results.name: slith ability
results.description: Whenever a creature deals combat damage to a player, it gets a +1/+1 counter.

results.name: sliver prime
results.description: An evolved form of Sliver that is humanoid

results.name: sliver-stackable
results.description: Slivers having abilities where more than one instance of the ability does provide additional benefit.

results.name: smothering
results.description: Depicts somebody's mouth being covered, in an attempt to suffocate them.

results.name: snake-eyes
results.description: The South Wind Avatar from Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles.

results.name: sneak
results.description: Put a permanent from your hand onto the battlefield. (With or without a requirement to sacrifice it later.) Not related to the Sneak keyword first seen in TMT.

results.name: sneak-land
results.description: Cards that let you put lands on the battlefield from your hand without playing them.

results.name: sneaky-self-trigger
results.description: Cards that are worded in a way that makes it easy to miss that they trigger one of their own abilities.
